---
title: "ISSS608-Visual Analytics and Applications"
listing:
  - id: hands-on-listings
    contents: Hands-On_Ex
    type: grid
    sort: "date asc"
    fields: [image, title, author, date]
    categories: false
    page-size: 6
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Welcome to **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Application** homepage**.** This site showcases my coursework, hands-on exercises, and project work completed for the course taught by **Prof Kam Tin Seong**.

![Overview:](images/data_analytics_robot.png){width="94%"}

## About This Website

This website serves as a portfolio of my learning journey in visual analytics.  
It contains hands-on exercises, in-class work, take-home assignments, and group project materials developed throughout the course.



## Hands On Exercise

::: {#hands-on-listings}
:::
